positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed composition of a mystical forest scene at twilight. Focus on stylized bioluminescent flora, giant glowing mushrooms, and the silhouette of a majestic forest creature passing through a shimmering gateway arch. Style: Clean vector illustration, graphic novel quality, high contrast, sharp edges, minimal shading. The composition must be perfectly centered and optimized for apparel printing, utilizing negative space effectively. Color palette: Deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, accented with luminous cyan and gold highlights. Lighting: Dramatic, emanating only from the flora and the central archway, creating stark backlighting and deep contrast.
negative: blurry, low detail, amateur, text, watermark, signature, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, poor composition, messy, gradients, out of focus, photorealistic, watercolor
